title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition introduced FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and production-ready rather than just test-passing. It uses blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics on pull requests from 36 open-source repositories, covering multiple programming languages and focusing on real code review standards.
